concerns.detail: Use of profanity and personal insult '傻逼吗' (idiot/moron) attacking the critic rather than the substance of the criticism regarding lab resources
Unsupported personal attack on critic's competence '你自己菜' (you are incompetent/incompetent yourself) rather than addressing the advising practice concerns
concerns.excerpt: 你自己菜就去别的地方ok?

concerns.detail: Derogatory age-based slur '老登' (old fart/boomer) used to dismiss critics' experiences rather than engaging with the pushiness criticism
